channel.title: utm.one Resources
channel.description: Guides, playbooks, and frameworks for UTM tracking, campaign analytics, and revenue attribution

item.title: The UTM Guide (2025 Edition)
item.description: The definitive guide to UTM tracking, naming conventions, and governance. 11 interactive tools, real-world case studies, and multi-touch attribution strategies.

item.title: LLM-First SEO Guide
item.description: Optimize your content for AI discovery. Structured data, content formatting, and technical requirements for ranking in ChatGPT and Claude.

item.title: Clean-Track Framework Guide
item.description: The 4-layer architecture for tracking at scale: syntax, naming, governance, and reporting.

item.title: LLM Ranking Playbook
item.description: 90-day roadmap to rank in ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity. Week-by-week implementation guide for AI visibility.

item.title: UTM Governance Playbook
item.description: Enterprise-grade UTM governance for marketing teams. Approval workflows, naming standards, and audit processes.

item.title: Sales & Marketing Alignment Playbook
item.description: Bridge the gap between sales and marketing with shared attribution data and unified tracking.

item.title: Clean-Track Model
item.description: The 4-layer framework for reliable campaign tracking: syntax validation, naming rules, governance workflows, and automated reporting.

item.title: B2B Attribution Framework
item.description: Multi-touch attribution designed for long B2B sales cycles. Account-based tracking and revenue mapping.
